Class OnyxPlugin

java.lang.Object
org.bukkit.plugin.PluginBase
org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin
com.zombienw.onyxlib.OnyxPlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
LifecycleEventOwner, net.kyori.adventure.key.Namespaced, CommandExecutor, TabCompleter, TabExecutor, Listener, Plugin
public class OnyxPlugin extends JavaPlugin implements Listener
The core JavaPlugin instance for OnyxLib. Manages the lifecycle of the framework and triggers global state changes.
